title: The Tokenization Tax: Why Non-English LLM Users Pay More
summary: A closer look at how subword tokenization creates a hidden computational and financial cost for speakers of non-Latin-script languages.

title: A Weird Thing About Zhuang and Why It Matters for NLP
summary: Zhuang is the most-spoken language you've never heard of. It also breaks several assumptions that NLP researchers make without realizing it.

title: What Is Cross-Lingual Transfer, Actually?
summary: An accessible explainer on one of the core ideas in multilingual NLP — written for a curious friend who keeps asking.
